name: com.oneqaz/oneqaz-trading-mcp
title: Trading Signal & Market Regime MCP Server
description: MCP server for real-time trading signal analysis, position monitoring, 7-stage market regime detection (extreme_bearish to extreme_bullish), Fear & Greed index, cross-market pattern recognition, and portfolio tracking. Supports crypto, US stocks, and Korean stocks.

environmentVariables.name: DATA_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Root directory for market data files
